description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease with this pair of slippers from gas. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic clothing and look great both ways. Upper Wide woven and leather straps with a toe separator for maximum durability, comfort and style Brand name on the footbed Midsole Leather midsole for enhanced durability and style Outsole Durable rubber and textured outsole for absolute grip and traction shoe Care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
